creator: hsu@clinet.fi
text:
The system sometimes locks on early on boot, right after copyright
messages.  I think this was introduced when someone committed a change to
the keyboard driver couple of months ago, but I thought it had been fixed
already (I vaguely remember a commit which reversed the change, but I could
be wrong?)

How-To-Repeat: 
Reboot enough times.  This may require specific type of keyboard, if that
happens to be the cause.  I have not seen this with older kernels (3 months
old).
